channel.title: Smith, Amy on Chege's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Smith, Amy on Chege's Blog

item.title: [ToDo] [MAS S67] The Great Problems
item.description:
The Great Problems. Kevin M. Esvelt; Rosalind Picard; Neil Buddy Shah; Amy Smith; Anne White; Kai Steinmetz; David Keith; Toby Ord; Megan Palmer. MIT. canvas.mit.edu . 2021.

Introduction: Triumphs and Tragedies

Great Problem: Mental Health

  • Finland is the happiest country in the world, and the Finns aren’t happy about it.
  • Burden of Depressive Disorders by Country, Sex, Age and Year
  • Development, Freedom, and Rising Happines: A Global Perspective (1981 - 2007)
  • How to Be Happy
  • A Nihilist’s Guide to Meaning
  • How Bad Are Things?

Technological Trajectories
